concepts: The sexual orientation of the first friend (bisexual)
The sexual orientation of the second friend (straight)
The relationship between the two individuals (friends)
The bisexual friend’s questioning of labels and stereotypes associated with sexual orientations
current_setting: the bisexual friend is questioning labels and stereotypes associated with sexual orientations
new_settings: the bisexual friend is accepting labels and stereotypes associated with sexual orientations

concepts: The straight friend’s affirmation of their identity
current_setting: the straight friend is affirming their identity
new_settings: the straight friend is doubting their identity

concepts: The discussion about how they view sexual orientation
current_setting: they are discussing how they view sexual orientation
new_settings: they are discussing an unrelated topic such as favorite movies
